gloss_record.canonical_gloss: Matrix: A Matrix is a rectangular array or matrix-related structure used to organize mathematical quantities and transformations.
gloss_record.concise_form: Matrix: A Matrix is a rectangular array or matrix-related structure used to organize mathematical quantities and transformations.
gloss_record.pedagogical_form: Think of matrix as a Matrix is a rectangular array or matrix-related structure used to organize mathematical quantities and transformations.
gloss_record.expert_form: Matrix denotes a Matrix is a rectangular array or matrix-related structure used to organize mathematical quantities and transformations.
gloss_record.document_role_form: In a mathematical document, matrix usually signals a matrix concept with provenance from OntoMathPRO.
gloss_record.accessibility_note: Strong merge candidate for linear algebra; exact IRIs still need to be recorded OntoMathPRO class mathematics:E1703 has direct rdfs:label Matrix@en; selected as canonical IRI according to Week 2 rules Need to add MathModDB/OpenMath identifiers later if exact matches are confirmed Confirmed mapped in seed ontology with canonical OntoMathPRO link.

gloss_record.canonical_gloss: Variable: A Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse.
gloss_record.concise_form: Variable: A Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse.
gloss_record.pedagogical_form: Think of variable as a Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse.
gloss_record.expert_form: Variable denotes a Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse.
gloss_record.document_role_form: In a mathematical document, variable usually signals a scalar concept with provenance from OntoMathPRO; MathModDB.
gloss_record.accessibility_note: Mathematical role in expressions and models; exact IRIs still need to be recorded MathModDB contains DecisionVariable as a variable-related source IRI; selected as provisional source IRI for Variable because no clean general Variable class was found in the available seed sources Provisional specialized mapping; review later if a general Variable source IRI is found Confirmed mapped in seed ontology with canonical MathModDB link. Variable is retained as a provisional or specialized mapping where the source ontology evidence may not be a clean general-purpose concept match.
